title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 91.190 - Bid for construction to be submitted to voters
text:
91.190.  Bid for construction to be submitted to voters. — The council shall then, by ordinance, submit the proposition to erect the waterworks system as provided in the contract, ordinance and other proceedings, and to pay for same by bonds issued as aforesaid, to the voters of the city, as provided in section 91.120.  The proposition to be submitted at the election shall be:
(RSMo 1939 § 7816, A. 1949 H.B. 2039, A.L. 1975 H.B. 947) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7671; 1919 § 9109; 1909 § 9934
